boss.name: fazm
boss.description: Fazm Desktop for macOS. Desktop-native AI experience that doesn't feel like a web wrapper.
boss.why: early days. worth watching. could be something.

hot.name: scarf
hot.description: Native macOS GUI companion for the Hermes AI agent — dashboard, session browser, activity feed, embedded terminal.
hot.why: respects your system. built for hermes. native swiftui.

hot.name: CodexMonitor
hot.description: Monitor the (Codex) situation. Clean Tauri app, cross-platform.
hot.why: reads the situation so you don't have to.

hot.name: yazi
hot.description: Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust. Async I/O, image previews, code syntax.
hot.why: rust+async+terminals. what did you expect except fast?

hot.name: claude-notifications-go
hot.description: Cross-platform smart notifications plugin for Claude Code. 6 types. Click-to-focus.
hot.why: stops you from opening another browser tab.

warm.name: Pearcleaner
warm.description: A free, source-available macOS app cleaner. Actually works.
warm.why: app cleaners are usually sketchy. this one's open-source.

warm.name: mori
warm.description: Native macOS workspace terminal organized around Projects and Worktrees, powered by tmux and libghostty.
warm.why: no electron. no webview. just swift.

warm.name: advent-of-code-rust
warm.description: Blazing fast Rust solutions for every Advent of Code puzzle from 2015 to 2025.
warm.why: rust. you know what that means. fast.

warm.name: Transity
warm.description: Keep track of your 💵, 🕘, 🐖, 🐄, 🍻 on your command line.
warm.why: written in rust. probably correct and probably fast.

warm.name: duf
warm.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility. Modern, pretty, with graphs. Finally.
warm.why: df -h is fine. this is actually useful.

warm.name: zsh-syntax-highlighting
warm.description: Fish-like syntax highlighting for zsh. See your mistakes before you execute them.

cold.name: terraform-provider-google-beta
cold.description: Terraform Provider for Google Cloud Platform (Beta)
cold.why: does one thing. does it. doesn't get in the way.

cold.name: base58
cold.description: Fast implementation of base58 encoding on golang.
cold.why: exists quietly. works consistently. that's the point.

cold.name: Tmx-theme
cold.description: Powerlevel10k Zsh prompt ⚡ Astronvim IDE configuration 🖥️ Custom Nerd Fonts integration 🎨
cold.why: neovim setup that doesn't require a lua config degree.

cold.name: Sista
cold.description: Object-oriented library for making terminal videogames and animations.
cold.why: terminal games are back. this is how.

cold.name: boa
cold.description: Opinionated declarative CLI args, ENV vars and config files.
cold.why: cli-first. no web interface. respects your terminal.

cold.name: melt
cold.description: Backup and restore your Charm Cloud data.
cold.why: small tool. solves backup anxiety. that's it.

cold.name: curlie
cold.description: The power of curl, the ease of use of httpie. Best of both worlds.
cold.why: curl syntax is a memory test. this is human-readable.

cold.name: uv
cold.description: An extremely fast Python package installer and resolver, written in Rust.
cold.why: pip install is archaeology. uv is the present.

cold.name: fd
cold.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to 'find'.
cold.why: find is a regex exam. this is a tool.
